strategies.description: Use when restore or support confidence is insufficient.
Prioritize reaching a manageable transport before OS selection.
Use when hard blockers prevent a safe build or flash path.
Prefer a maintainable, security-aware path over novelty.
Prefer a stock-derived hardened path for simple, stable, and battery-friendly usage.
Prefer a constrained family-oriented build with strong safety defaults.
Prefer a maintainable aftermarket ROM path for developer-oriented usage.
Prefer a privacy-focused aftermarket path with reduced Google dependency.
Use only when device support and restore path are proven.
